title: dipterocarpus conformis subsp. conformis
intro: Dipterocarpus conformis subsp. conformis, also known as the Asian dipterocarp, is a species of tree that belongs to the family Dipterocarpaceae. The bark and leaves of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dipterocarpus conformis subsp. conformis include relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, with the bark and leaves being boiled in water to create a medicinal tea.
